evals.prompt: Find the best meeting time this week for a team in Washington DC and Riyadh
evals.expected_output: Meeting windows on Mon-Thu showing 13:00-14:00 UTC overlap (09:00-10:00 EDT / 16:00-17:00 AST), Friday excluded as Gulf weekend

assertions.text: Reports a 60-minute overlap window on each work day

evals.prompt: Convert February 29, 2000 to Hijri and find overlap for DC, London, and Riyadh
evals.expected_output: Hijri: ~26 Dhul Qa'dah 1420 AH with leap year note and ±1-2 day caveat. Meeting: zero-minute overlap explained clearly.

assertions.text: Validates Feb 29 2000 as a legitimate Gregorian leap year date
Hijri month is Dhul Qa'dah (month 11) of year 1420
Meeting section reports no feasible overlap
Diagnoses exact cause: DC starts at same UTC instant Riyadh ends
Includes tabular caveat (±1-2 days from Umm al-Qura)

evals.prompt: Schedule a meeting during Ramadan at 2pm Riyadh time every day for a month
evals.expected_output: Advisory warning that declines to silently schedule: explains Ramadan shortened hours, fasting fatigue, prayer times, and offers post-Iftar alternative.

assertions.text: Does not generate 30 scheduled meeting slots without warning
Mentions shortened working hours (09:00-14:00) for Gulf during Ramadan
Provides at least one concrete time alternative with both UTC and local equivalents
Asks for confirmation / provides --force-schedule override path
